meaning: 卡纳塔克邦[印度邦名](旧称迈索尔邦
examples: It is a great trekking spot in Karnataka.
The floods, in Andhra Pradesh and Karnataka states, are the worst in decades.
Mr. Yeddyurappa denied the allegations and also quit the BJP to form the Karnataka Janata Paksha.
The BJP runs the government of the state of Karnataka, of which Bangalore is the capital.
